exercises.title: Plot Points on a Graph
exercises.content: On a Cartesian graph, plot these points: (1,2), (3,4), (-2,1), (0,-3). Draw the axes, label them, mark each point.
hints: x-axis is horizontal, y-axis is vertical
Positive x goes right, positive y goes up

exercises.title: Name the Coordinates
exercises.content: Given 3 points on a graph, write their (x,y) coordinates. Be careful about the signs and exact values.
